serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-31. activate_project --project ~1.3s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. search_for_pattern great for cross-linter pattern audits (used R31 to find which linters use pass.TypesInfo).

open_issues.sg31a1_R31: sortslice (23rd linter) registered cmd/linters/main.go:37+63 but UNDOCUMENTED: doc.go:3 'All 22'+22 bullets (no sortslice between seenmapbool/ssljson); README.md ZERO sortslice refs (bullet/table/import/usage/subpkg-list); spec_test documentedAnalyzers() 22 entries + note '22 subpackages' -> TestSpec_PublicAPI does NOT validate sortslice.Analyzer. Fix: bump all 3 to 23 (mirror lenstringzero #37740). Self_consistency, proven-to-land.
open_issues.sg31a2_R31: sortslice precision: matches sort.Slice/SliceStable by SYNTACTIC pkgIdent.Name=='sort' (sortslice.go:54-57), no pass.TypesInfo. FP on shadowing (local/field named sort, or non-sort pkg aliased to sort); FN on stdlib sort aliased import (import s "sort"; s.Slice). SOLE package-matcher skipping type verify -> mirror fmterrorfnoverbs.isFmtErrorf (ObjectOf->*types.PkgName->Imported().Path()=='sort'). Single-file precision, proven-to-land template.
open_issues.sortslice_enforce: NOT enforced (cgo.yml:1119 still 12). HAS internal/nolint already (BuildLineIndex L32). Blocker = 50+ prod sort.Slice sites/33 files. MIGRATION OWNED BY lint-monster #38012/#38014 (open) — DO NOT REFILE migration/enforce; enforce auto-follows once migration lands.
open_issues.lenstringzero_enforce: NOT enforced. Has nolint? verify. Blocker remediation 20+ direct string sites (ADR). Roadmap.
open_issues.nolint_parity: coverage now 15+ (12 enforced + errormessage + seenmapbool + sortslice). Missing: contextcancelnotdeferred ctxbackground excessivefuncparams fileclosenotdeferred largefunc ossetenvlibrary ssljson lenstringzero. Carry.

patterns.new_linter_doc_lag: CONFIRMED 2x (lenstringzero R30->landed R31; sortslice R31): NEW linters land in driver main.go BEFORE doc.go/README/spec_test sync. Each run: diff cmd/linters/main.go analyzer count vs doc.go 'All N' vs spec_test documentedAnalyzers() len -> gap = self_consistency issue, lands ~1day.
patterns.new_linter_precision_audit: NEW R31 pattern: when a NEW linter lands, search_for_pattern pass.TypesInfo across pkg/linters to see if newcomer matches stdlib pkgs by type vs syntactic name. sortslice was sole syntactic matcher -> precision issue. Apply to each future new linter.
patterns.precision_fix_lands: Single-file linter precision/enforce fixes land ~1day: sg24a1 R25, sg27a1 R28, sg28a1 enforce R29, sg29a1+sg29a2 R30, sg30a1+sg30a2 R31. Non-near-zero (seenmapbool 60+, sortslice 50+) does NOT auto-land via sergo — pivot to precision/doc/nolint or defer to migration bots.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1119 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS, R31=12 flags. Append flag for zero-vio linter; convert-to-zero or //nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.cross_bot_dedup: NEW R31: other bots file overlapping issues (lint-monster #38012/#38014 sort.Slice migration). Before filing enforce/migration issues, `gh search issues --repo github/gh-aw --state open '<term>' --json number,title` to avoid dup. Sergo scoped to doc-sync + precision (orthogonal to migration).
patterns.team_closes_fast: Sergo issues -> PRs + CLOSED within ~1-2 days; open_issues usually empty. gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all confirms landings.

linters_R31.doc_gap: sortslice registered cmd/linters/main.go but NOT in doc.go/README.md/spec_test.go (sg31a1).

linters_R31.unenforced_11: contextcancelnotdeferred ctxbackground errormessage(opt-in) excessivefuncparams fileclosenotdeferred largefunc ossetenvlibrary ssljson seenmapbool(dismissed-escape) lenstringzero sortslice(NEW,migration-owned-by-lint-monster)
linters_R31.next_candidates: R32: verify sg31a1 doc-sync landed; verify sg31a2 type-identity precision landed; watch for 24th linter (run new_linter_doc_lag + new_linter_precision_audit); lenstringzero enforce-roadmap; sortslice enforce auto-follows lint-monster migration.

repo_context: pkg/: 894 prod .go, 1264 test .go. 23 analyzer subpkgs + internal/. ~33 files use sort.Slice/SliceStable (50+ call sites).
bash_policy: Sandbox blocks multi-stmt compounds, ls/mkdir/cat/sed outside repo, for-loops, backtick grep, git on /tmp, go build. printf-with-raw-JSON BLOCKED -> Write payload to /tmp/gh-aw/agent/*.json then `safeoutputs create_issue . < file`. gh issue/search subcmd 'Malformed version:' for some flags BUT gh api repos/.../issues?labels=sergo --jq WORKS + gh search issues --json WORKS. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT touch /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory. KEEP MEMORY ~10KB; compact strategies.jsonl to ~3 recent.
